metadata.description: Short environment token: dev | stg | prd
Secondary region for Foundry (EUS2 required for Claude Sonnet)
PostgreSQL administrator login (Entra-only auth after deploy)
PostgreSQL administrator password (rotated after first deploy)
ADE API key from landing.ai (stored in KV post-deploy)
Deploying principal object ID (gets KV admin during bootstrap)
Odoo container image tag (SHA-256 digest from acripaiprd)
Enable zone redundancy on ACA env (requires at least B-series SKU region support)

properties.description: IPAI MI → KV Secrets User (ACA containers)
Bootstrap deployer — remove after initial secret population

properties.contentType: LandingAI ADE API key — rotate at landing.ai
PostgreSQL ipai-odoo-prd admin password — rotate after first deploy

metadata.description: PostgreSQL SKU — Burstable B2s for dev, General Purpose D4s for prd

metadata.purpose: BIR document upload inbox for ADE processing

metadata.description: Raw Odoo CDC + agent telemetry events

queues.name: bir-inbox
queues.purpose: BIR document upload → ADE processing pipeline

queues.name: ap-invoice
queues.purpose: Vendor invoice → AP Invoice Bot ingestion queue

queues.name: po-events
queues.purpose: Reorder alert → PO Agent creation queue

queues.name: agent-dlq
queues.purpose: Dead-letter queue for failed agent events (DLQ/backoff)

properties.description: IPAI MI → Service Bus Data Owner (agent queues)

properties.notes: Protects IPAI production AI Search index

properties.description: IPAI MI → AI Search Index Data Contributor
IPAI MI → Foundry Cognitive Services User (Claude inference)
IPAI MI → ACR Pull (all ACA containers)
IPAI MI → ACR Push (ipai-build-agent pushes Odoo images)

containers.name: odoo-web
containers.env: [union(variables('commonEnv'), createArray(createObject('name', 'ODOO_ROLE', 'value', 'web'), createObject('name', 'DB_HOST', 'value', parameters('pgHost')), createObject('name', 'DB_NAME', 'value', 'odoo'), createObject('name', 'DB_PORT', 'value', '5432'), createObject('name', 'ACA_SERVICE_NAME', 'value', format('ca-{0}-odoo-web-{1}', parameters('prefix'), parameters('env'))), createObject('name', 'ODOO_MAX_CRON_THREADS', 'value', '0')))]

containers.name: odoo-cron
containers.env: [union(variables('commonEnv'), createArray(createObject('name', 'ODOO_ROLE', 'value', 'cron'), createObject('name', 'DB_HOST', 'value', parameters('pgHost')), createObject('name', 'DB_NAME', 'value', 'odoo'), createObject('name', 'ODOO_MAX_CRON_THREADS', 'value', '2'), createObject('name', 'ACA_SERVICE_NAME', 'value', format('ca-{0}-odoo-cron-{1}', parameters('prefix'), parameters('env')))))]

containers.name: odoo-worker
containers.env: [union(variables('commonEnv'), createArray(createObject('name', 'ODOO_ROLE', 'value', 'worker'), createObject('name', 'DB_HOST', 'value', parameters('pgHost')), createObject('name', 'DB_NAME', 'value', 'odoo'), createObject('name', 'ACA_SERVICE_NAME', 'value', format('ca-{0}-odoo-worker-{1}', parameters('prefix'), parameters('env')))))]

containers.name: release-manager
containers.env: [union(variables('commonEnv'), createArray(createObject('name', 'ACA_SERVICE_NAME', 'value', format('ca-{0}-release-manager-{1}', parameters('prefix'), parameters('env'))), createObject('name', 'ADO_ORG', 'value', 'insightpulseai'), createObject('name', 'ADO_PROJECT', 'value', 'ipai-platform'), createObject('name', 'EVAL_THRESHOLD_REGRESSION', 'value', '0.95'), createObject('name', 'EVAL_THRESHOLD_CAPABILITY', 'value', '0.70')))]

containers.name: ade-mcp
containers.env: [union(variables('commonEnv'), createArray(createObject('name', 'VISION_AGENT_API_KEY', 'secretRef', 'ade-api-key'), createObject('name', 'ACA_SERVICE_NAME', 'value', format('ca-{0}-ade-mcp-{1}', parameters('prefix'), parameters('env'))), createObject('name', 'ADE_MODEL', 'value', 'dpt-2-latest')))]

containers.name: build-agent
containers.env: [union(variables('commonEnv'), createArray(createObject('name', 'ACA_SERVICE_NAME', 'value', format('caj-{0}-build-agent-{1}', parameters('prefix'), parameters('env'))), createObject('name', 'ACR_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('acrLoginServer'))))]
